channel.title: geometry on Elias Judin
channel.description: Recent content in geometry on Elias Judin

item.title: Is the double twisted Möbius strip isotopic to the ordinary strip in real 3-space?
item.description: Over the past couple days I have been watching Tadashi Tokieda’s Topology and Geometry lectures, given at AIMS. I thought they would help me prepare for my first point-set topology course. The material is very different, but I think the lectures will help my intuition. Regardless, they have been a lot of fun. In one of the lectures Tokieda gives a project: is the double twisted Möbius strip isotopic to the ordinary strip in $\mathbb{R}^3$?
